item.title: Wildfire Threatens Local Beef Supply
item.description: A severe wildfire is putting our cattle and beef production at risk, highlighting the impact on livestock, farms, and the local food supply.

media:content.media:title: Wildfire Threatens Local Beef Supply
media:content.media:description: A severe wildfire is putting our cattle and beef production at risk, highlighting the impact on livestock, farms, and the local food supply.

item.title: Mud Spa Day Experience
item.description: Enjoy a relaxing spa day in the mud, highlighting natural treatments, soothing textures, and the satisfying experience of a full-body mud soak.

media:content.media:title: Mud Spa Day Experience
media:content.media:description: Enjoy a relaxing spa day in the mud, highlighting natural treatments, soothing textures, and the satisfying experience of a full-body mud soak.

item.title: Exploring the Grain Bin
item.description: Step inside a grain bin to see its structure, storage capacity, and safety tips while exploring how grain is stored and managed on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Exploring the Grain Bin
media:content.media:description: Step inside a grain bin to see its structure, storage capacity, and safety tips while exploring how grain is stored and managed on the farm.

item.title: Seeding Grass in a Large Yard
item.description: Step-by-step process for seeding grass in a big yard, including soil prep, spreading techniques, and tips for achieving a lush, healthy lawn.

media:content.media:title: Seeding Grass in a Large Yard
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step process for seeding grass in a big yard, including soil prep, spreading techniques, and tips for achieving a lush, healthy lawn.

item.title: Tractor Turns Into a Trash Collector
item.description: See how a tractor is repurposed to collect trash efficiently, showcasing practical modifications and field-ready solutions for cleanup tasks.

media:content.media:title: Tractor Turns Into a Trash Collector
media:content.media:description: See how a tractor is repurposed to collect trash efficiently, showcasing practical modifications and field-ready solutions for cleanup tasks.

item.title: Fixing a Bent Tire Rim
item.description: Watch the process of addressing a bent tire rim, from inspection to repair, ensuring safe and smooth driving performance.

media:content.media:title: Fixing a Bent Tire Rim
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of addressing a bent tire rim, from inspection to repair, ensuring safe and smooth driving performance.

item.title: Field Work with a New Surprise Tractor
item.description: Join us for field work using a new tractor, exploring its features, performance, and efficiency in real farming tasks.

media:content.media:title: Field Work with a New Surprise Tractor
media:content.media:description: Join us for field work using a new tractor, exploring its features, performance, and efficiency in real farming tasks.

item.title: Mini Tractor vs Big Expectations
item.description: Test a mini tractor to see if it meets high expectations, showcasing performance, handling, and capabilities in real-world farming and utility tasks.

media:content.media:title: Mini Tractor vs Big Expectations
media:content.media:description: Test a mini tractor to see if it meets high expectations, showcasing performance, handling, and capabilities in real-world farming and utility tasks.

item.title: These New Tools Are a Game-Changer
item.description: Discover new tools that transform work efficiency and ease, highlighting features, benefits, and practical uses for projects and everyday tasks.

media:content.media:title: These New Tools Are a Game-Changer
media:content.media:description: Discover new tools that transform work efficiency and ease, highlighting features, benefits, and practical uses for projects and everyday tasks.

item.title: Abandoned Truck: Can We Get It Running?
item.description: Explore an abandoned truck and attempt to get it running, showing repairs, troubleshooting, and the challenges of reviving a long-unused vehicle.

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Truck: Can We Get It Running?
media:content.media:description: Explore an abandoned truck and attempt to get it running, showing repairs, troubleshooting, and the challenges of reviving a long-unused vehicle.

item.title: Welding a Project from Start to Finish
item.description: Watch the process of welding a project, including preparation, joining, and finishing techniques to create a strong and functional metal piece.

media:content.media:title: Welding a Project from Start to Finish
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of welding a project, including preparation, joining, and finishing techniques to create a strong and functional metal piece.

item.title: Driving a Tractor Without Auto Steer
item.description: Watch a demonstration of driving a tractor manually, showcasing skill and control without using auto steer for precision and efficiency on the field.

media:content.media:title: Driving a Tractor Without Auto Steer
media:content.media:description: Watch a demonstration of driving a tractor manually, showcasing skill and control without using auto steer for precision and efficiency on the field.
